title: WordScript Regression Transcript Corpus
description: Schema for fixture entries that drive transcription-bias and correction-guardrail regression tests. Each entry is a reproducer for one observed failure mode, used by corpus-driven unit tests.

version.description: Corpus schema version. Bump on incompatible changes.

id.description: snake_case identifier unique within the corpus

raw_transcript.description: What STT (or simulated STT) actually delivered before AI cleanup

biased_correction.description: Optional: the LLM's biased/incorrect correction attempt, used to assert guardrail rejection. If null, the test asserts a clean pass-through of the raw transcript.

expected_transcription_bias.description: Expected outcome of the bias analysis path before correction

expected_post_correction.description: What the user should see after Transform runs. Usually the raw transcript when a guardrail fires.

expected_guardrail.description: Name of the applied_rules entry expected from normalize_correction. Null when no guardrail fires.

notes.description: Free-form explanation of the failure mode for the next reader. Anonymize any real customer data.
